Petition To Instruct Trustee To Sell Real Property Or Alternatively To Remove And Replace Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Off Calendar

Petition To Instruct Trustee To Sell Real Property Or Alternatively To Remove And Replace Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Instruct Trustee To Sell Real Property Or Alternatively To Remove And Replace Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Continued To Jul-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: John Kithas appeared via zoom for Adlai J. Jourdin (petitioner).
Marta Eisenberg appeared via zoom for and with Sarah Jourdin (respondent).

Mr. Kithas stated that they need to hire a professional that knows about values on properties and rental values, that Ms. Jourdin lived in the property for 3 years, and that a neutral party appraiser would be necessary. Ms. Eisenburg is open to mediation, and that a mediator should be able to resolve these issues through mediation. Both parties agree to keep working on a resolution until they go to mediation. The Court orders the trustee to deposit sale proceeds to the bank, not to draw upon for expenses towards the trust unless both parties have an agreement or by Court agreement. Matter is continued to July 08, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than June 28, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 03, 2024. The matter is continued to July 08, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and the Parties are to return on July 08, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Aquino. Not reported.

Petition To Instruct Trustee To Sell Real Property Or Alternatively To Remove And Replace Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Continued To Apr-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Kithas appeared by zoom for Adlai Jourdin (petitioner).
Marta Eisenberg appeared by zoom for and with Sally Jourdin (trustee).

The parties reported that the only asset of the trust/the property in San Francisco has been sold, that the only issue is how those sale proceeds are to be distributed, that Mrs. Eisenberg's client has provided a list of expenses for which she would like to be reimbursed and that a settlement proposal was provided yesterday. Further discussion was held regarding the lack of trust between the parties. The Petition to Instruct Trustee to Sell Real Property, etc. is continued to April 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The parties are encouraged to try and get the matter settled.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
